creator: adrian@freebsd.org
text:
A lack of descriptions for SYSCTL_ macros in the kernel.

Fix: 

A patch against -current cvsup'ed Wed April 7 1999's /usr/src/sys tree
with a bunch of SYSCTL_* descriptions is at :

http://www.freebsd.org/~adrian/desc-current.diff
How-To-Repeat: 
Look through the kernel for SYSCTL_ macros.
